allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://voice-word-jumper-316095696419.europe-west2.run.app/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "LENGTH: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; Write-Output "=== HEAD ==="; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(1500, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: import Voice Word Jumper demo as MVP v0 foundation *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'ci: add PR template, Lychee config, and link-check workflow *)
